title: grewia scabrifolia
intro: Grewia scabrifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the hairy stem cluster tree. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its use as an anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Grewia scabrifolia include its ability to aid in the treatment of various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water, or by drying and powdering the plant material for use in teas, capsules, or topical applications.
